category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes lrzip as Long Range Zip.
source_facts.description: Compression program with a very high compression ratio.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository is ckolivas/lrzip and uses the lrzip name.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the best official documentation surface for lrzip usage and project details.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository ckolivas/lrzip is maintained under the upstream author account and matches source_facts.homepage.
tags_sources: Official repository description identifies lrzip as Long Range Zip.
